title: DeST-OT: Alignment of Spatiotemporal Transcriptomics Data.
author: Halmos P Liu X Gold J Chen F Ding L Raphael BJ
content: S-EPMC10942402 PMC10942402 DeST-OT: Alignment of Spatiotemporal Transcriptomics Data. Spatially resolved transcriptomics (SRT) measures mRNA transcripts at thousands of locations within a tissue slice, revealing spatial variations in gene expression and distribution of cell types.
